summary: Admin customers screen successfully implements the success state with proper mobile narrow layout. All required elements are present and functional: heading, search controls, status filter, and customer data table with quick actions. The interface maintains usability at 390px viewport width with horizontal scrolling available for the data table.

violations.description: The admin interface uses a dark theme palette that appropriately separates from public marketing surfaces, maintaining visual distinction between signed-in app chrome and public legal/marketing palette as required.

actions: Verify horizontal scroll functionality works smoothly for table data at narrow widths
Test search and filter interactions remain responsive on mobile devices
Confirm quick action buttons (suspend/impersonate) maintain proper touch targets
